title: Anuragia stocksii
taxonomy: Anuragia stocksii is classified as a species of lichenous fungus in the genus Anuragia, which belongs to the family Pyrenulaceae. This fungus is further classified as a member of the order Pyrenulales. The classification of Anuragia stocksii is also supported by its morphological characteristics, including its thallus and ascospores. The species has been studied and documented by mycologists, who have used various taxonomic keys to identify it. Through these classifications, Anuragia stocksii has been placed within the broader context of fungal diversity.
